layers.name: User Space
layers.summary_zh: 用户态程序与 C 库:shell、coreutils、malloc 与系统调用桩
layers.summary_en: Userland programs and C library: shell, coreutils, malloc, and syscall stubs

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: cat 入口:把命令行文件(或标准输入)逐个拼接输出到标准输出。
classes.description_en: cat entry point: concatenate the given files (or stdin) to standard output.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: echo 入口:把命令行参数以空格连接并加换行打印到标准输出。
classes.description_en: echo entry point: print command-line arguments space-separated with a trailing newline.

classes.name: grep
classes.description_zh: 按行读取文件描述符,匹配模式者整行输出。
classes.description_en: Read a file descriptor line by line, printing lines that match the pattern.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: grep 入口:取首参为模式,在各文件或标准输入中搜索匹配行。
classes.description_en: grep entry point: search files or stdin for lines matching the first-argument pattern.

classes.name: match
classes.description_zh: 正则匹配顶层入口,处理锚点并在文本各起点尝试匹配。
classes.description_en: Regex match entry: handle the anchor and try matching at each text position.

classes.name: matchhere
classes.description_zh: 在文本开头处递归匹配正则的剩余部分。
classes.description_en: Recursively match the rest of the regex at the start of the text.

classes.name: matchstar
classes.description_zh: 匹配 c* 通配,贪婪消费零或多个字符再续配。
classes.description_en: Match the c* wildcard, consuming zero or more chars before continuing.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: init 入口:首个用户进程,打开控制台并循环 fork/exec 守护重启 shell。
classes.description_en: init entry point: first user process; opens console and forever forks/execs and restarts the shell.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: kill 入口:对每个命令行 PID 发起终止系统调用。
classes.description_en: kill entry point: send a kill syscall to each PID given on the command line.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: ln 入口:为已有文件创建一个硬链接(新名)。
classes.description_en: ln entry point: create a hard link (new name) to an existing file.

classes.name: ls
classes.description_zh: 列出路径:对文件直接打印,对目录遍历条目并逐项 stat 打印。
classes.description_en: List a path: print a file directly, or walk a directory and stat each entry.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: ls 入口:列出各命令行路径,无参时列出当前目录。
classes.description_en: ls entry point: list each path argument, defaulting to the current directory.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: mkdir 入口:为每个命令行名称创建一个目录。
classes.description_en: mkdir entry point: create a directory for each name given on the command line.

classes.name: putc
classes.signature: static void putc(int fd, char c)

classes.name: printint
classes.signature: static void printint(int fd, long long xx, int base, int sgn)

classes.name: printptr
classes.signature: static void printptr(int fd, uint64 x)

classes.name: vprintf
classes.signature: void vprintf(int fd, const char *fmt, va_list ap)
classes.description_zh: 格式化打印核心:解析格式串与 va_list,逐字符写入指定 fd。
classes.description_en: Core formatted-print engine: parse the format and va_list, writing chars to the given fd.

classes.name: fprintf
classes.description_zh: 向指定文件描述符做可变参数格式化输出,委托给 vprintf。
classes.description_en: Variadic formatted output to a given file descriptor, delegating to vprintf.

classes.name: printf
classes.description_zh: 向标准输出做可变参数格式化输出,委托给 vprintf。
classes.description_en: Variadic formatted output to standard output, delegating to vprintf.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: rm 入口:对每个命令行名称做 unlink 以删除文件。
classes.description_en: rm entry point: unlink each name given on the command line to delete files.

classes.name: runcmd
classes.description_zh: 命令树执行器:按节点类型递归执行,处理 exec/重定向/管道/列表/后台。
classes.description_en: Command-tree executor: recursively run nodes for exec, redirect, pipe, list, and background.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: shell 入口:REPL 循环读取一行,内置 cd,否则 fork 子进程解析并执行。
classes.description_en: Shell entry point: REPL reading a line; built-in cd, else fork a child to parse and run it.

classes.name: panic
classes.description_zh: 打印错误信息到标准错误并以失败码退出 shell。
classes.description_en: Print an error message to stderr and exit the shell with failure.

classes.name: fork1
classes.description_zh: fork 的包装,失败时直接 panic,简化调用处错误处理。
classes.description_en: Wrapper around fork that panics on failure to simplify caller error handling.

classes.name: redircmd
classes.display_name: user.sh.redircmd struct cmd * redircmd(struct cmd *subcmd, char *file, char *efile, int mode, int fd)
classes.signature: struct cmd * redircmd(struct cmd *subcmd, char *file, char *efile, int mode, int fd)

classes.name: pipecmd
classes.display_name: user.sh.pipecmd struct cmd * pipecmd(struct cmd *left, struct cmd *right)
classes.signature: struct cmd * pipecmd(struct cmd *left, struct cmd *right)

classes.name: listcmd
classes.display_name: user.sh.listcmd struct cmd * listcmd(struct cmd *left, struct cmd *right)
classes.signature: struct cmd * listcmd(struct cmd *left, struct cmd *right)

classes.name: gettoken
classes.description_zh: 词法分析器:跳过空白,返回下一个符号或词 token 及其边界。
classes.description_en: Lexer: skip whitespace and return the next symbol or word token with its bounds.

classes.name: peek
classes.description_zh: 前瞻:跳过空白后查看下一个字符是否属于给定 token 集。
classes.description_en: Lookahead: skip whitespace and test whether the next char is in a given token set.

classes.name: parsecmd
classes.description_zh: 解析顶层入口:把整行解析成命令树并 NUL 终结各串。
classes.description_en: Top-level parse entry: parse a whole line into a command tree and NUL-terminate strings.

classes.name: parseline
classes.description_zh: 解析一行:处理后台 & 与列表分号 ; 构成的命令序列。
classes.description_en: Parse a line: handle background & and semicolon-separated command lists.

classes.name: parsepipe
classes.description_zh: 解析管道:把若干 exec 命令以 | 连成右递归的管道树。
classes.description_en: Parse pipelines: chain exec commands with | into a right-recursive pipe tree.

classes.name: parseredirs
classes.signature: struct cmd * parseredirs(struct cmd *cmd, char **ps, char *es)
classes.description_zh: 解析重定向:把 < > >> 包裹成重定向命令节点。
classes.description_en: Parse redirections: wrap a command in redirect nodes for <, >, and >>.

classes.name: parseblock
classes.description_zh: 解析括号块:把 ( … ) 内的子命令行解析为可重定向的复合命令。
classes.description_en: Parse a parenthesized block: parse the inner command line into a redirectable group.

classes.name: parseexec
classes.description_zh: 解析单条执行命令:收集参数与重定向,或下沉解析括号块。
classes.description_en: Parse a single exec command: gather argv and redirects, or descend into a block.

classes.name: memset
classes.signature: void * memset(void *dst, int c, uint n)

classes.name: memmove
classes.signature: void * memmove(void *vdst, const void *vsrc, int n)

classes.name: memcmp
classes.signature: int memcmp(const void *s1, const void *s2, uint n)

classes.name: memcpy
classes.signature: void * memcpy(void *dst, const void *src, uint n)

classes.name: wc
classes.description_zh: 统计一个文件描述符的行数、词数、字符数。
classes.description_en: Count the lines, words, and characters of one file descriptor.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: wc 入口:统计各命令行文件(或标准输入)的行/词/字符数。
classes.description_en: wc entry point: report line/word/char counts for each file argument or stdin.

layers.name: System Call Interface
layers.summary_zh: 用户态陷入内核的系统调用分发与进程/文件相关实现
layers.summary_en: System-call dispatch and the process/file syscall implementations at the user/kernel boundary

classes.name: fetchstr
classes.signature: int fetchstr(uint64 addr, char *buf, int max)

classes.name: argstr
classes.signature: int argstr(int n, char *buf, int max)

classes.name: syscall
classes.description_zh: 按 a7 中的系统调用号查表分派到对应实现并回写返回值。
classes.description_en: Dispatch a syscall by its a7 number through the table and store the return value.

classes.name: argfd
classes.signature: static int argfd(int n, int *pfd, struct file **pf)

classes.name: sys_dup
classes.description_zh: 复制一个文件描述符,共享同一底层 file。
classes.description_en: Duplicate a file descriptor, sharing the same underlying file.

classes.name: sys_close
classes.description_zh: 清空进程的文件描述符槽并关闭对应 file。
classes.description_en: Clear the process's fd slot and close its underlying file.

classes.name: sys_link
classes.description_zh: 在事务中创建一条指向已有 inode 的新硬链接目录项。
classes.description_en: Create, in a transaction, a new hard-link directory entry to an existing inode.

classes.name: sys_unlink
classes.description_zh: 在事务中删除路径的目录项,递减链接计数。
classes.description_en: Remove a path's directory entry in a transaction, decrementing the link count.

classes.name: create
classes.signature: static struct inode * create(char *path, short type, short major, short minor)

classes.name: sys_open
classes.description_zh: 打开或创建文件,分配 file 与描述符并设定读写权限。
classes.description_en: Open or create a file, allocating a file and fd and setting read/write permissions.

classes.name: sys_chdir
classes.description_zh: 将进程当前工作目录切换为指定路径的目录 inode。
classes.description_en: Change the process's current working directory to the inode at the given path.

classes.name: sys_pipe
classes.description_zh: 创建管道并把读写两端的描述符拷回用户数组。
classes.description_en: Create a pipe and copy its read/write fd pair back into the user array.

classes.name: sys_pause
classes.description_zh: 使调用进程睡眠等待 n 个时钟滴答。
classes.description_en: Sleep the calling process for n timer ticks.

layers.name: Boot & Startup
layers.summary_zh: 机器上电入口、每核初始化与内核主引导序列
layers.summary_en: Machine power-on entry, per-hart setup, and the kernel main bring-up sequence

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: hart 0 上的内核入口,按序初始化所有子系统并创建首个用户进程,然后进入调度器。
classes.description_en: Kernel entry on hart 0: sequentially initializes all subsystems, creates the first user process, then enters the scheduler.

classes.name: start
classes.description_zh: 机器模式启动入口,配置特权级、中断委派与 PMP,再 mret 跳入监督模式的 main。
classes.description_en: Machine-mode boot entry: configures privilege, interrupt delegation, and PMP, then mret-jumps into supervisor-mode main.

classes.name: timerinit
classes.description_zh: 启用 sstc 扩展并授予监督模式访问定时器,请求首个时钟中断。
classes.description_en: Enables the sstc extension and grants supervisor timer access, requesting the first clock interrupt.

layers.name: Process & Scheduling
layers.summary_zh: 进程生命周期、调度器、上下文切换与 fork/exec/exit/wait
layers.summary_en: Process lifecycle, the scheduler, context switch, and fork/exec/exit/wait

classes.name: loadseg
classes.signature: static int loadseg(pagetable_t pagetable, uint64 va, struct inode *ip, uint offset, uint sz)

classes.name: mycpu
classes.description_zh: 返回当前 CPU 的 cpu 结构,要求中断已关闭。
classes.description_en: Returns the current CPU's cpu struct; requires interrupts disabled.

classes.name: myproc
classes.description_zh: 安全返回当前 CPU 正在运行的进程,无则返回零。
classes.description_en: Safely returns the process currently running on this CPU, or zero if none.

classes.name: kfork
classes.description_zh: fork 实现:分配子进程并复制父进程地址空间、文件描述符与状态,返回新 pid。
classes.description_en: fork implementation: allocates a child, copies parent's address space, file descriptors, and state, returns new pid.

classes.name: kexit
classes.description_zh: exit 实现:关闭文件、把孤儿子进程交给 init、转为 zombie 并永不返回地切入调度器。
classes.description_en: exit implementation: closes files, reparents children to init, becomes a zombie, and switches to the scheduler forever.

classes.name: kwait
classes.description_zh: wait 实现:阻塞等待某个子进程退出,回收其资源并返回 pid。
classes.description_en: wait implementation: blocks until a child exits, reaps it, and returns its pid.

classes.name: sched
classes.description_zh: 进程让出 CPU 的核心切换:校验锁与中断状态后 swtch 回每 CPU 调度器线程。
classes.description_en: Core context switch giving up the CPU: validates lock/interrupt invariants then swtch's back to the per-CPU scheduler thread.

classes.name: yield
classes.description_zh: 主动放弃 CPU 一轮调度,将当前进程置为 RUNNABLE 并调用 sched。
classes.description_en: Voluntarily yields the CPU for one scheduling round, marking the process RUNNABLE and calling sched.

classes.name: sleep
classes.description_zh: 在指定通道上原子地睡眠并释放条件锁,被唤醒后重获锁。
classes.description_en: Atomically sleeps on a channel while releasing the condition lock, reacquiring it upon wakeup.

classes.name: wakeup
classes.description_zh: 唤醒所有睡在指定通道上的进程,将其状态置为 RUNNABLE。
classes.description_en: Wakes all processes sleeping on a given channel, marking them RUNNABLE.

classes.name: killed
classes.description_zh: 加锁查询进程是否已被标记为 killed。
classes.description_en: Returns, under lock, whether the process has been flagged as killed.

classes.name: either_copyout
classes.signature: int either_copyout(int user_dst, uint64 dst, void *src, uint64 len)

classes.name: either_copyin
classes.signature: int either_copyin(void *dst, int user_src, uint64 src, uint64 len)

layers.name: Virtual Memory
layers.summary_zh: Sv39 页表、内核/用户地址空间映射与物理页分配器
layers.summary_en: Sv39 page tables, kernel/user address-space mapping, and the physical page allocator

classes.name: kfree
classes.description_zh: 将一个 4096 字节物理页归还空闲链表,先填垃圾以捕获悬垂引用。
classes.description_en: Returns a 4096-byte physical page to the free list, filling it with junk to catch dangling references.

classes.name: kalloc
classes.description_zh: 从空闲链表取出一个 4096 字节物理页供内核使用,内存不足时返回零。
classes.description_en: Allocates one 4096-byte physical page from the free list for kernel use, returning zero when out of memory.

classes.name: kvmmake
classes.description_zh: 构建内核直接映射页表,映射 MMIO 设备、内核代码/数据、trampoline 与各进程内核栈。
classes.description_en: Builds the kernel's direct-map page table, mapping MMIO devices, kernel text/data, the trampoline, and per-process kernel stacks.

classes.name: kvmmap
classes.signature: void kvmmap(pagetable_t kpgtbl, uint64 va, uint64 pa, uint64 sz, int perm)

classes.name: walk
classes.signature: pte_t * walk(pagetable_t pagetable, uint64 va, int alloc)
classes.description_zh: 遍历三级 Sv39 页表返回对应虚拟地址的 PTE,alloc 时按需创建中间页表页。
classes.description_en: Walks the three-level Sv39 page table to return a virtual address's PTE, allocating intermediate tables on demand.

classes.name: mappages
classes.signature: int mappages(pagetable_t pagetable, uint64 va, uint64 size, uint64 pa, int perm)
classes.description_zh: 为一段虚拟地址范围逐页建立指向物理地址的 PTE,设置权限位。
classes.description_en: Installs PTEs mapping a range of virtual addresses to physical addresses with the given permissions, page by page.

classes.name: uvmunmap
classes.signature: void uvmunmap(pagetable_t pagetable, uint64 va, uint64 npages, int do_free)
classes.description_zh: 移除从某虚拟地址起的若干页映射,可选地释放底层物理内存。
classes.description_en: Removes a span of page mappings starting at a virtual address, optionally freeing the underlying physical memory.

classes.name: uvmalloc
classes.signature: uint64 uvmalloc(pagetable_t pagetable, uint64 oldsz, uint64 newsz, int xperm)

classes.name: uvmdealloc
classes.signature: uint64 uvmdealloc(pagetable_t pagetable, uint64 oldsz, uint64 newsz)

classes.name: uvmcopy
classes.signature: int uvmcopy(pagetable_t old, pagetable_t new, uint64 sz)

classes.name: copyout
classes.signature: int copyout(pagetable_t pagetable, uint64 dstva, char *src, uint64 len)

classes.name: copyin
classes.signature: int copyin(pagetable_t pagetable, char *dst, uint64 srcva, uint64 len)

classes.name: copyinstr
classes.signature: int copyinstr(pagetable_t pagetable, char *dst, uint64 srcva, uint64 max)

classes.name: vmfault
classes.signature: uint64 vmfault(pagetable_t pagetable, uint64 va, int read)
classes.description_zh: 处理对 sys_sbrk 惰性分配页的缺页:分配并映射一个清零物理页。
classes.description_en: Handles a page fault on a lazily-allocated sbrk page by allocating and mapping a fresh zeroed physical page.

layers.name: Traps & Interrupts
layers.summary_zh: 陷阱/中断分发、内核与用户态向量及 PLIC 外部中断控制器
layers.summary_en: Trap/interrupt dispatch, kernel and user trap vectors, and the PLIC external-interrupt controller

classes.name: usertrap
classes.description_zh: 用户态陷入的统一处理入口:分派系统调用、设备中断与缺页,返回用户 satp。
classes.description_en: Unified handler for traps from user space: dispatches syscalls, device interrupts, and page faults, returning the user satp.

classes.name: prepare_return
classes.description_zh: 为返回用户空间布置 trapframe 与控制寄存器,把陷入向量切回 trampoline 的 uservec。
classes.description_en: Sets up the trapframe and control registers for a return to user space, pointing the trap vector back at trampoline's uservec.

classes.name: kerneltrap
classes.description_zh: 内核态陷入处理:仅处理设备/定时器中断,定时器中断时让出 CPU 并恢复陷入寄存器。
classes.description_en: Handles traps from kernel code: services device/timer interrupts, yielding on a timer tick and restoring trap registers.

classes.name: clockintr
classes.description_zh: 时钟中断处理:由 hart 0 递增全局 ticks 并唤醒等待者,再排程下一次定时中断。
classes.description_en: Clock interrupt handler: hart 0 bumps the global tick counter and wakes waiters, then schedules the next timer interrupt.

layers.name: File System
layers.summary_zh: inode 层、缓冲区缓存、崩溃恢复日志、文件抽象与管道
layers.summary_en: The inode layer, buffer cache, crash-recovery log, file abstraction, and pipes

classes.name: bget
classes.signature: static struct buf * bget(uint dev, uint blockno)

classes.name: bread
classes.signature: struct buf * bread(uint dev, uint blockno)

classes.name: filealloc
classes.description_zh: 从全局文件表分配一个空闲 file 结构并将引用计数置一。
classes.description_en: Allocate a free file struct from the global file table with refcount one.

classes.name: fileclose
classes.description_zh: 递减 file 引用计数,归零时按类型关闭底层管道或释放 inode。
classes.description_en: Decrement a file's refcount, releasing its pipe or inode when it reaches zero.

classes.name: filestat
classes.description_zh: 读取 inode/设备文件的元数据并拷贝 stat 结构到用户空间。
classes.description_en: Fetch an inode/device file's metadata and copy the stat struct to user space.

classes.name: fileread
classes.signature: int fileread(struct file *f, uint64 addr, int n)
classes.description_zh: 按文件类型把数据从管道、设备或 inode 读入用户缓冲并推进偏移。
classes.description_en: Read from a file into a user buffer, dispatching by pipe, device, or inode type.

classes.name: filewrite
classes.signature: int filewrite(struct file *f, uint64 addr, int n)
classes.description_zh: 按类型写文件,inode 写入分块进事务以不超出日志大小。
classes.description_en: Write to a file by type, chunking inode writes into transactions to bound log size.

classes.name: readsb
classes.signature: static void readsb(int dev, struct superblock *sb)

classes.name: bzero
classes.signature: static void bzero(int dev, int bno)

classes.name: bfree
classes.signature: static void bfree(int dev, uint b)

classes.name: ialloc
classes.signature: struct inode * ialloc(uint dev, short type)

classes.name: iget
classes.signature: static struct inode * iget(uint dev, uint inum)

classes.name: ilock
classes.description_zh: 取得 inode 的睡眠锁,必要时从磁盘加载其元数据。
classes.description_en: Acquire an in-core inode's sleep lock, loading its metadata from disk if needed.

classes.name: iunlock
classes.description_zh: 释放 inode 的睡眠锁。
classes.description_en: Release an in-core inode's sleep lock.

classes.name: iput
classes.description_zh: 减少 inode 内存引用,无引用且无链接时截断并在磁盘释放该 inode。
classes.description_en: Drop an inode's in-memory reference, freeing it on disk when it has no links left.

classes.name: iunlockput
classes.description_zh: 先解锁再释放 inode 引用的常用组合操作。
classes.description_en: Common idiom that unlocks an inode then drops its reference.

classes.name: ireclaim
classes.description_zh: 扫描磁盘回收无链接的孤儿 inode,用于崩溃后清理。
classes.description_en: Scan the disk to reclaim orphaned link-less inodes, cleaning up after a crash.

classes.name: bmap
classes.signature: static uint bmap(struct inode *ip, uint bn)

classes.name: readi
classes.signature: int readi(struct inode *ip, int user_dst, uint64 dst, uint off, uint n)
classes.description_zh: 从 inode 的数据块读取 n 字节到内核或用户目的地。
classes.description_en: Read n bytes from an inode's data blocks into a kernel or user destination.

classes.name: writei
classes.signature: int writei(struct inode *ip, int user_src, uint64 src, uint off, uint n)
classes.description_zh: 把 n 字节写入 inode 数据块,必要时分配块并回写 inode。
classes.description_en: Write n bytes into an inode's data blocks, allocating blocks and updating the inode.

classes.name: dirlookup
classes.signature: struct inode * dirlookup(struct inode *dp, char *name, uint *poff)
classes.description_zh: 在目录 inode 中按名查找目录项并返回对应 inode。
classes.description_en: Search a directory inode for an entry by name and return its inode.

classes.name: dirlink
classes.signature: int dirlink(struct inode *dp, char *name, uint inum)
classes.description_zh: 向目录写入一条新的(名字, inum)目录项。
classes.description_en: Write a new (name, inum) entry into a directory inode.

classes.name: namex
classes.signature: static struct inode * namex(char *path, int nameiparent, char *name)

classes.name: end_op
classes.description_zh: 结束一次文件系统操作,若是最后一个未完成操作则提交日志事务。
classes.description_en: End a filesystem op, committing the log transaction if it was the last outstanding one.

classes.name: pipe
classes.description_zh: 分配管道及其读写两端的 file 结构。
classes.description_en: Allocate a pipe and its paired read/write file structs.

classes.name: pipeclose
classes.description_zh: 关闭管道的一端,两端皆关时释放管道内存。
classes.description_en: Close one end of a pipe, freeing it once both ends are closed.

classes.name: pipewrite
classes.signature: int pipewrite(struct pipe *pi, uint64 addr, int n)
classes.description_zh: 把用户数据写入管道环形缓冲,满时阻塞等待读者。
classes.description_en: Write user data into the pipe's ring buffer, blocking for readers when full.

classes.name: piperead
classes.signature: int piperead(struct pipe *pi, uint64 addr, int n)
classes.description_zh: 从管道环形缓冲读出数据到用户,空时阻塞等待写者。
classes.description_en: Read data from the pipe's ring buffer to the user, blocking for writers when empty.

layers.name: Device Drivers
layers.summary_zh: virtio 磁盘、UART 串口与控制台设备驱动
layers.summary_en: The virtio disk, UART serial, and console device drivers

classes.name: consputc
classes.description_zh: 向 UART 同步输出单个字符,退格则擦除上一个输出字符;可在中断中安全调用。
classes.description_en: Synchronously emit one character to the UART, erasing the prior char on backspace; safe in interrupts.

classes.name: consolewrite
classes.signature: int consolewrite(int user_src, uint64 src, int n)

classes.name: consoleread
classes.signature: int consoleread(int user_dst, uint64 dst, int n)
classes.description_zh: 实现控制台 read 系统调用,从输入缓冲区拷贝一整行到用户空间,无数据时睡眠等待。
classes.description_en: Backs the console read() syscall, copying a whole input line to user space, sleeping until data arrives.

classes.name: consoleintr
classes.description_zh: 控制台输入中断处理器,做退格/杀行等行编辑,整行到达后唤醒 consoleread。
classes.description_en: Console input interrupt handler doing line editing (erase/kill) and waking consoleread when a full line arrives.

classes.name: uartwrite
classes.description_zh: 将缓冲区经中断驱动方式异步发往 UART,UART 忙时睡眠;仅供 write 系统调用使用。
classes.description_en: Transmit a buffer to the UART interrupt-driven, sleeping while busy; usable only from write() syscalls.

classes.name: uartputc_sync
classes.description_zh: 自旋等待发送寄存器空后同步写出一字节,供 printk 与回显在中断中使用。
classes.description_en: Spin-wait then synchronously write one byte to the UART, for printk and echo, usable in interrupts.

classes.name: uartintr
classes.description_zh: UART 中断处理器:发送完成时唤醒发送线程,并将到达的输入字符交给 consoleintr。
classes.description_en: UART interrupt handler: wakes the sender on transmit-complete and feeds arrived input chars to consoleintr.

layers.name: Synchronization & Primitives
layers.summary_zh: 自旋锁、睡眠锁、RISC-V 寄存器访问与内核基础工具(字符串、printf)
layers.summary_en: Spinlocks, sleeplocks, RISC-V register access, and kernel primitives (string ops, printf)

classes.name: printint
classes.signature: static void printint(long long xx, int base, int sign)

classes.name: printk
classes.description_zh: 内核格式化打印,按 %d/%x/%s 等解析并逐字符送到控制台,加锁防止交错。
classes.description_en: Kernel formatted printer parsing %d/%x/%s etc. to the console, locked to prevent interleaving.

classes.name: panic
classes.description_zh: 打印 panic 消息后置 panicked 冻结其他 CPU 输出并永久自旋停机。
classes.description_en: Print a panic message, set panicked to freeze other CPUs' output, then spin forever.

classes.name: printkinit
classes.description_zh: 初始化 printk 的输出自旋锁。
classes.description_en: Initialize the printk output spinlock.

classes.name: intr_on
classes.description_zh: 通过置 sstatus SIE 位开启设备中断。
classes.description_en: Enable device interrupts by setting the SIE bit in sstatus.

classes.name: intr_off
classes.description_zh: 通过清 sstatus SIE 位关闭设备中断。
classes.description_en: Disable device interrupts by clearing the SIE bit in sstatus.

classes.name: intr_get
classes.description_zh: 读取 sstatus SIE 位,返回设备中断当前是否启用。
classes.description_en: Read the sstatus SIE bit to report whether device interrupts are currently enabled.

classes.name: initsleeplock
classes.description_zh: 初始化睡眠锁:重置其内部自旋锁、名字、locked 与持有者 pid。
classes.description_en: Initialize a sleeplock, resetting its inner spinlock, name, locked flag, and holder pid.

classes.name: acquiresleep
classes.description_zh: 获取睡眠锁;锁被占用时让出 CPU 睡眠,可长时间持有。
classes.description_en: Acquire a sleeplock, yielding the CPU via sleep while held, allowing long-held ownership.

classes.name: releasesleep
classes.description_zh: 释放睡眠锁,清除持有者并唤醒等待该锁的进程。
classes.description_en: Release a sleeplock, clearing the holder and waking processes waiting on it.

classes.name: holdingsleep
classes.description_zh: 返回当前进程是否持有该睡眠锁。
classes.description_en: Report whether the current process holds this sleeplock.

classes.name: initlock
classes.description_zh: 初始化自旋锁的名字、locked 标志与持有 CPU。
classes.description_en: Initialize a spinlock's name, locked flag, and owning CPU.

classes.name: acquire
classes.description_zh: 关中断后用原子交换自旋获取自旋锁,带获取语义内存屏障。
classes.description_en: Disable interrupts then spin via atomic exchange to acquire the lock with acquire-ordering.

classes.name: release
classes.description_zh: 以释放语义原子清零解锁,并恢复中断嵌套计数。
classes.description_en: Atomically clear the lock with release-ordering and restore the interrupt-disable nesting.

classes.name: holding
classes.description_zh: 检查本 CPU 是否持有该自旋锁(须在关中断下调用)。
classes.description_en: Check whether this CPU holds the spinlock (interrupts must be off).

classes.name: push_off
classes.description_zh: 关中断并增加嵌套计数,首次关闭时保存原中断使能状态。
classes.description_en: Disable interrupts and bump the nesting count, saving prior enable state on the first push.

classes.name: pop_off
classes.description_zh: 递减中断嵌套计数,归零且原先开启时恢复中断。
classes.description_en: Decrement the interrupt-disable nesting count, re-enabling interrupts when it reaches zero.

classes.name: memset
classes.signature: void * memset(void *dst, int c, uint n)

classes.name: memcmp
classes.signature: int memcmp(const void *v1, const void *v2, uint n)

classes.name: memmove
classes.signature: void * memmove(void *dst, const void *src, uint n)
classes.description_zh: 内存块拷贝,正确处理源与目标重叠的方向。
classes.description_en: Copy a memory block, handling overlapping source and destination correctly.

classes.name: memcpy
classes.signature: void * memcpy(void *dst, const void *src, uint n)
classes.description_zh: 为安抚 GCC 而存在的内存拷贝,直接转调 memmove。
classes.description_en: A memcpy that exists to placate GCC, simply delegating to memmove.

classes.name: strncmp
classes.signature: int strncmp(const char *p, const char *q, uint n)
classes.description_zh: 按字典序比较至多 n 个字节的两个字符串。
classes.description_en: Compare two strings lexicographically up to n bytes.

classes.name: strncpy
classes.signature: char * strncpy(char *s, const char *t, int n)
classes.description_zh: 拷贝至多 n 字节字符串,不足部分以 NUL 填充。
classes.description_en: Copy a string up to n bytes, padding the remainder with NUL.

classes.name: safestrcpy
classes.signature: char * safestrcpy(char *s, const char *t, int n)

layers.name: Host Tools
layers.summary_zh: 主机端构建初始文件系统镜像的工具
layers.summary_en: Host-side tool that builds the initial filesystem image

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: 宿主工具入口:写出磁盘布局与根目录,把用户程序追加成 fs.img 文件系统镜像。
classes.description_en: Host tool entry: lay out the disk and root dir, appending user programs to build the fs.img image.

classes.name: winode
classes.description_zh: 将一个磁盘 inode 结构写入镜像对应的 inode 块。
classes.description_en: Write a single on-disk inode structure into its block in the image.

classes.name: ialloc
classes.description_zh: 分配下一个空闲 inode 号,初始化类型并写出。
classes.description_en: Allocate the next free inode number, initialize its type, and write it out.

classes.name: iappend
classes.signature: void iappend(uint inum, void *xp, int n)
classes.description_zh: 向 inode 追加数据,按需分配直接/间接块并更新文件大小。
classes.description_en: Append data to an inode, allocating direct/indirect blocks as needed and updating its size.

layer_groups.name: Kernel Subsystems
layer_groups.summary_zh: 内核五大功能子系统:进程调度、虚拟内存、陷阱中断、文件系统、设备驱动
layer_groups.summary_en: The five core kernel subsystems: scheduling, virtual memory, traps, the file system, and device drivers

flows.description_zh: 从机器模式入口到创建首个用户进程并进入调度器的端到端引导序列。
flows.description_en: End-to-end bring-up from the machine-mode entry to creating the first user process and entering the scheduler.

flows.description_zh: 用户进程经 ecall 陷入内核、按号分派到实现再 sret 返回用户态的完整往返。
flows.description_en: A user process's full round trip: ecall into the kernel, dispatch by number, then sret back to user mode.

flows.name_zh: 进程调度与上下文切换
flows.description_zh: 进程经 yield/sched 让出 CPU,swtch 切回每 CPU 调度器线程,再 swtch 切入下一个 RUNNABLE 进程。
flows.description_en: A process yields via yield/sched, swtch's back to the per-CPU scheduler, which swtch's into the next RUNNABLE process.

steps.label_zh: 置 RUNNABLE 并调用 sched()
sched 经 swtch 切回调度器

steps.label_en: scan table for the next RUNNABLE

steps.label_zh: swtch 切入选中进程继续运行

flows.name_zh: 文件写入与崩溃恢复日志
flows.description_zh: 一次 inode 写入如何进入事务、登记脏块,并在最后一个 end_op 时经重做日志提交到磁盘。
flows.description_en: How an inode write enters a transaction, logs dirty blocks, and commits through the redo log to disk on the last end_op.

links.label_en: dirty blocks to the log area

flows.description_zh: 对 sbrk 惰性分配页的访问触发缺页,vmfault 分配清零页并经 mappages/walk 安装 PTE 后重试。
flows.description_en: Touching a lazily-allocated sbrk page faults; vmfault allocates a zeroed page and installs a PTE via mappages/walk, then retries.

flows.description_zh: 中断驱动的控制台:UART 中断把字符交给 consoleintr 做行编辑与回显,整行到达后唤醒睡眠中的 consoleread。
flows.description_en: Interrupt-driven console: a UART interrupt feeds consoleintr for line editing and echo, waking the sleeping consoleread when a full line arrives.

steps.label_zh: consoleread 缓冲空则 sleep 等待
steps.label_en: consoleread sleeps on an empty buffer

steps.label_zh: 按键触发 UART RX 中断
steps.label_en: keypress raises a UART RX interrupt
whole line arrives, wakeup the reader

steps.label_zh: 醒来后拷贝整行到用户空间
steps.label_en: awoken, copies the line to user space
